title: Friend Zone
overview: ‘Falling in Love with Your Best Friend’ is about the love between two best friends of the opposite sex, An (Kaity Nguyen) and Toan (Tran Ngoc Vang), who always miss opportunities to be together. The film's scenery stretches across Vietnam from North to South, accompanied by famous landscapes and landmarks.
